name: Empirical Grounding Improves the Realism of LLM Agents Simulating Human Behavior During Disruptions
summary: arXiv:2607.17437v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents offer a generative approach to simulating human behavior under conditions that may have few or no direct historical...
description: arXiv:2607.17437v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents offer a generative approach to simulating human behavior under conditions that may have few or no direct historical analogues, a common challenge in disaster and infrastructure-disruption planning. However, this generative capacity creates a validity problem: individually plausible agent reasoning may fail to repr...
author: Chen Xia, Zexi Kuang, Yuqing Hu
